steps.title: Eliminate the y terms
steps.content:
Multiply the first equation by $2$ and the second equation by $3$. This makes the $y$-terms opposites.
$$2(18x-24y)=2(37),\quad 36x-48y=74$$
$$3(7x+16y)=3(52),\quad 21x+48y=156$$

steps.title: Match the numerator
steps.content:
Add the equations, then divide by $57$.
$$57x=230$$
$$x=\frac{230}{57}$$
The solution form says $x=\frac{p}{57}$, so $p=230$. The answer is 230.
